messages.content:
I can help interpret or plan it, but I can’t actually execute the load test from here.

If you want, send the details for “task 2” or the command/config you expect to run, and I can help you:
- identify the exact command,
- explain the expected results,
- troubleshoot failures,
- or review the load test setup.

If you need me to change or add code to support it, submit again with a concrete coding request, or turn off Chat-only mode.

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
